hooks.command: node -e "const chunks=[]; process.stdin.on('data',d=>chunks.push(d)); process.stdin.on('end',()=>{ const d=JSON.parse(chunks.join('')); const f=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.file_path)||''; if(/\.orchids\/files\/.*\.(jpeg|jpg|png|webp)$/.test(f)){ const path=require('path'); const dest=path.basename(f).replace(/^[0-9]+-/,'').replace(/-[0-9]+\.(jpeg|jpg|png|webp)$/,'.jpeg'); const {execSync}=require('child_process'); try{ const out=execSync('node scripts/add-adventure-image.mjs '+JSON.stringify(f)+' '+JSON.stringify(dest),{encoding:'utf8'}); console.log(out.trim().split('\n').slice(-3).join('\n')); }catch(e){console.error(e.message);} } });"
